description: Public technical person with known GitHub footprint.
primary_eval: GitHub profile resolution, repo/artifact discovery, public-source evidence.
expected_failure_modes: wrong login; irrelevant repos; ungrounded topic association

description: Founder/operator with public GitHub and company context.
Researcher/builder with GitHub and academic footprint.
expected_failure_modes: missing papers; wrong coauthors; stale affiliation

description: Researcher where GitHub is not required and should not be hallucinated.
primary_eval: publication footprint and safe absence of GitHub.

description: Founder/operator where company/public source footprint is more important than GitHub.
primary_eval: affiliations, company context, public sources, source hygiene.

description: Common or ambiguous name requiring disambiguation.
primary_eval: low-confidence behavior, no auto-attach, no private data.
expected_failure_modes: incorrect identity merge; auto-attaching wrong profile
